title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at RINL South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at RINL South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with RINL South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Production Engineer for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About RINL South Asia Partners:
RINL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL South Asia Partners!
